[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010001 2
1 1010000001 3
2 1101000000 3
3 0001101000 3
4 0000100001 2
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 1101000000 3

12 21 0100100110 4
23 32 0100010101 4
34 43 0010000101 3
45 54 1010000001 3 match 1
56 65 0001101001 4
67 76 0001101001 4
70 07 1001000000 2

24 42 0000000111 3
35 53 0110000001 3
46 64 0000000001 1
57 75 1011101001 6
60 06 0001000000 1
71 17 1001101000 4

03 30 0100000000 1
14 41 1000000110 3
25 52 0100100001 3
36 63 0000010001 2 match 0
47 74 1010000001 3 match 1
50 05 1101000000 3 match 2 7
61 16 0001101000 3 match 3
72 27 0000100001 2 match 4

04 40 1000000010 2
15 51 1101101000 5
26 62 0000110001 3
37 73 0010000001 2
